feature_tested: 30-Day Restaurant Simulation & Financial Analytics (Simulation endpoints, EchoAi3 Analytics, EchoAurum P&L, EchoStratus Monthly Review, Financial Operations Panel)
summary: All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Simulation data exists with 2713 POS transactions, 63 invoices, 156 GL entries, 18 events, 150 labor schedules, 116 waste entries. Financial Operations panel loads correctly showing P&L Overview with KPIs (Revenue $459K, EBITDA $28K, Food Cost 20.9%, Labor 50.7%). EchoAurum actuals correctly avoid labor double-counting (EBITDA positive). AI narratives generated successfully via Emergent LLM Key.

issues: Initial load shows 'Loading Financial Operations...' for 10-15 seconds while AI analytics are fetched - consider showing partial data first

endpoints: GET /api/simulation/status - Returns non-zero counts for all data types (2713 POS, 63 invoices, 156 GL, 18 events, 150 labor, 116 waste)
GET /api/simulation/gap-analysis - Returns gaps array and financial_kpis (Revenue $459K, EBITDA $28K, Food 20.9%, Labor 50.7%)
GET /api/simulation/invoices - Lists 63 invoices with summary by status and category
GET /api/simulation/invoices/{invoice_id} - Returns invoice with PO and receiving linkage
GET /api/simulation/pnl-drilldown?category=food_revenue - Returns GL entries for food revenue (GL code 4000)
GET /api/simulation/purchasing-pipeline - Shows PO->Receiving->Invoice linkage with 100% fully linked
POST /api/echoai3/analytics/business-review - Returns period_summary, recommendations, top_menu_items, vendor_analysis, ai_narrative
POST /api/echoai3/analytics/next-month-forecast - Returns daily_forecast, weekly_forecast, summary with positive forecast_revenue
GET /api/echo-stratus/aurum/actuals - Returns P&L without labor double-counting (EBITDA positive ~$28K)
POST /api/echo-stratus/monthly-review/generate - Generates review with outlet_reports and health_summary

verified_elements: Dashboard displays Enterprise Command Center with 14/14 engines
Financial Operations visible in sidebar under FINANCIAL & SUPPLY section
Financial Operations panel loads with P&L Overview tab
KPIs displayed: Revenue $459,060, Gross Profit $356,710, EBITDA $28,053
P&L Drill-Down buttons visible (Food Rev, Bev Rev, Banquet, Food COGS, Labor, Rent, Utilities)
TOP MENU ITEMS table visible with item data
All tabs visible: P&L Overview, Invoice Vault, Purchasing Pipeline, AI Analytics, Next Month Forecast, Gap Analysis

critical_code_review_comments: Simulation engine correctly generates 2700+ POS transactions, 60+ invoices, 150+ GL entries across 30 days
EchoAurum actuals correctly checks for GL labor entries before adding labor_schedules to avoid double-counting
EchoAi3 analytics uses Emergent LLM Key with gpt-4.1-mini model for AI narratives
Financial Operations panel makes 5 parallel API calls on load - consider progressive loading for better UX
seed_data_creation: Simulation data already exists from previous run (2713 POS transactions, 63 invoices, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 30-day restaurant simulation fully functional. Financial Operations panel loads P&L Overview with all KPIs. EchoAi3 analytics and forecast endpoints working with AI narratives. EchoAurum actuals correctly avoid labor double-counting. All simulation endpoints (status, gap-analysis, invoices, pnl-drilldown, purchasing-pipeline) working correctly. Toast POS and QuickBooks remain MOCKED with demo/sandbox data.
notes: All simulation and financial analytics features working correctly. The Financial Operations panel takes 10-15 seconds to fully load due to AI analytics API calls, but all data displays correctly. EBITDA is positive ($28K) confirming no labor double-counting in EchoAurum actuals.
